testcase.name: logintest
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.InvalidSelectorException: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //button[contains(text(),'Login)] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//button[contains(text(),'Login)]' is not a valid XPath expression.
